mainEntity.name: How to fix content not cited by Perplexity for Phoenix firms?
mainEntity.text: How to fix content not cited by Perplexity for Phoenix firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rewrite Phoenix content for 40-80 word direct answers, add schema, and boost E-E-A-T with Phoenix Bar links to get cited.

suggestedAnswer.text: Audit uncited pages; shorten intros, bold key facts. Submit to Perplexity via feedback. Phoenix real estate law thrives on property tax guides.

name: Fixing Non-Cited Content Phoenix
description: Rewrite Phoenix content for 40-80 word direct answers, add schema, and boost E-E-A-T with Phoenix Bar links to get cited.
